channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI investment isn't slowing down — venture capitalists are funding startups while trying to grapple with environmental impact
item.description: Generative AI is rapidly expanding, attracting significant investment while raising concerns about its environmental impact.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Trump hosts Apple CEO at Mar-a-Lago as big tech leaders continue outreach to president-elect
item.description: Donald Trump is hosting Apple CEO Tim Cook for a Friday evening dinner at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago resort.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller And Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NotebookLM Plus is now available to Google Workspace customers
item.description: A new premium version of Google’s NotebookLM AI assistant is now available to Google Workspace customers. Google unveiled NotebookLM last year, initially under the name Project Tailwind, and began testing the AI-powered “notebook” with select users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US updates a science and technology pact with China to reflect growing rivalry and security threats
item.description: The U.S. has updated a decades-old science and technology agreement with China to reflect their growing rivalry for technological dominance.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 12 easy, techy ways to make the holiday smoother
item.description: To make the busiest time of year more manageable, here are some tricks for tracking your packages, taking quality family photos and curating the perfect Christmas playlist.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Global internet traffic surges 17% as post-quantum cryptography adoption grows
item.description: Overall internet traffic continues to grow year after year, with no slowdown in sight. Cloudflare released its annual Cloudflare Radar Year in Review report this week, providing insights into the state of the internet in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Sweden gets one of the EU’s seven AI factories
item.description: The new Swedish AI factory is named Mimer and is one of seven now selected by the EU. Mimer is one of five of these AI factories that will now have a brand new AI-optimized supercomputer.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Apple updates MDM tools for new Apple Intelligence features
item.description: Apple has introduced significant improvements for enterprise IT admins in the newly-released iOS 18.2, including the power to manage the latest salvo of additional Apple Intelligence features and more. Here’s a swift look at what’s new.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Azure hardware innovations and the serverless cloud future
item.description: Microsoft uses its events to lift the hood on Azure’s hardware and the infrastructure it uses to manage and run its services. Ignite 2024 was no different.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX
item.description: Michelyne LeBlanc, the deputy CIO of the Defense Commissary Agency, said the move to zero trust is all about ensuring customer confidence in its services. The post Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network
